substances.name: Decabromodiphenyl ether (DecaBDE)
substances.reason_for_inclusion: Restricted under TSCA Section 6(h) PBT rule (86 Fed. Reg. 880, Jan 2021); prohibited for manufacture, processing, and distribution in commerce with certain exemptions and phase-outs

substances.name: Phenol, isopropylated phosphate (3:1) (PIP 3:1)
substances.reason_for_inclusion: Restricted under TSCA Section 6(h) PBT rule (86 Fed. Reg. 894, Jan 2021); prohibited for processing and distribution in commerce with certain exemptions and phase-outs

substances.name: 2,4,6-Tris(tert-butyl)phenol (2,4,6-TTBP)
substances.reason_for_inclusion: Restricted under TSCA Section 6(h) PBT rule (86 Fed. Reg. 866, Jan 2021); prohibited distribution in containers < 35 gallons at concentrations > 0.3% by weight

substances.name: Hexachlorobutadiene (HCBD)
substances.reason_for_inclusion: Restricted under TSCA Section 6(h) PBT rule (86 Fed. Reg. 922, Jan 2021); prohibited manufacturing, processing, and distribution except as unintentional byproduct

substances.name: Pentachlorothiophenol (PCTP)
substances.reason_for_inclusion: Restricted under TSCA Section 6(h) PBT rule (86 Fed. Reg. 911, Jan 2021); prohibited unless concentrations are at or below 1% by weight
